untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cointegration analysis, spread calculation between a portfolio of index constituents and index futures/ETF, and dynamic threshold detection based on cointegration relationships. These require multivariate statistical measures (Johansen cointegration test, spread mean-reversion half-life, Z-scores on spreads) that are not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal also has all critical parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period), making operationalization impossible without external configuration.
translation_notes: Arbitrage signals based on cointegration require access to: (1) constituent portfolio construction and valuation, (2) spread/basis calculation vs index futures, (3) cointegration strength metrics, (4) mean-reversion statistics. These fall outside single-instrument technical indicators. A production implementation would need a separate cointegration module with spread tracking, residual analysis, and threshold optimization based on historical Sharpe ratios.
